# modelmesh-serving

> modelmesh-serving (also known as: ModelMesh) is a Kubernetes component. managing 4 CRD(s): ClusterServingRuntime, InferenceService, Predictor, ServingRuntime. deploying 3 workload(s) (controller-manager, modelmesh-controller, etcd) with 4 container(s). watching 10 resource type(s). exposing 3 service(s) on ports: 2379, 8080, 9443. with 3 webhook(s) (1 validating). protected by 4 network policy/policies. connecting to external services: azure-blob. runtime dependencies: MinIO/S3. defining 2 API spec type(s) across 12 struct(s) with 43 total fields. with 93 operator config constants. following 1 reconciliation steps across 1 controller(s). integrates with Prometheus, management relationship via labels/annotations. deploys kube-rbac-proxy sidecar for RBAC-based authorization. kustomize overlays: config/certmanager, config/crd, config/default, config/manager, config/namespace-runtimes, config/overlays/odh/crd, config/overlays/odh/default, config/overlays/odh, config/overlays/odh/manager, config/overlays/odh/rbac, config/overlays/odh/scripts, config/overlays/odh/webhook, config/prometheus, config/rbac/cluster-scope, config/rbac/common, config/rbac/namespace-scope, config/runtimes, config/samples, config/webhook. references components: kserve (import). mounts 2 ConfigMap(s) as volumes: etcd-scripts, model-serving-config-defaults.
